seoTitle: Modbury Heights vs Moerlong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Modbury Heights and Moerlong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Modbury Heights vs Moerlong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Modbury Heights and Moerlong.
heading: Modbury Heights vs Moerlong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Modbury Heights, South Australia and Moerlong, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moerlong has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Modbury Heights (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Modbury Heights or Moerlong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Modbury Heights has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Moerlong scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Modbury Heights scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Moerlong scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Modbury Heights or Moerlong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moerlong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
